# Pull Request

## Summary

- Describe the change in one or two bullets.

## Scope

- [ ] Editor or preview behavior
- [ ] Desktop/file workflow
- [ ] Documentation or project metadata
- [ ] Build/release workflow

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Checked the editor in browser or desktop mode

## Screenshots or Evidence

Add screenshots, recordings, terminal output, or notes for user-facing changes.

## Notes

Mention any tradeoffs, follow-up work, or screenshots here.
